criteria.reason: Production authenticated UI smoke verified single CTA, dialog preview, creation banner, and no first-screen technical words.
Run review panel is shown before collapsed technical journal; human-readable review journal unit test passes.
Datahub-lite UI separates connected and available sources and shows readable states.
Version summary is visible and version diff test passes.
Production email agent smoke produced a draft, required final output approval, and did not dispatch externally.
Build, tests, lint, deploy, cleanup, and health checks passed.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_agent_blueprint_layer.py -k 'agent_blueprint_api_guards_version_blueprint_mismatch or agent_version_diff_shows_readable_changes or agent_run_review_journal_is_human_readable'
ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose exec -T postgres psql ... cleanup/verify ...'
ssh ... 'cd /opt/seo-app && docker compose ps && curl -I -sS http://localhost:8000 | head -5'
